hero.titlePrefix: Te Hanga i te Hangarau o Āpōpō,
hero.description: Ko Horizon Tech d.o.o. tētahi kamupene hangarau ā-ao e noho ana i Sarajevo, e tuku ana i ngā rongoā pūmanawa tapa-tapa ki ngā hinonga puta noa i ngā whenua e toru.

mission.title: Te Mahi
mission.description: Ka āwhina mātou i ngā whakahaere ki te huri i ngā whakaaro nui hei hua matihiko pono e waihanga ana i te uara pakihi ine.
points: Whakaritea te tukunga hangarau ki ngā putanga pakihi mārama.
Hangaia ngā pūnaha mo te wā roa ka taea tonu te pupuri i te tauine o ngā tīma.
Partner closely with stakeholders from strategy through execution.

expertise.title: tohungatanga
expertise.description: Ka whakakotahitia e ā mātou tīma maha te hōhonutanga pūkaha me te whakaaro hua puta noa i ngā tāpae hangarau hou.
points: Pūkaha tukutuku me te pūhara kōeke hinonga.
Hoahoa kapua, aunoatanga DevOps, me te hanganga pakari.
Hoatu AI/ML, ngā rerengamahi raraunga, me ngā hua whakahohe IoT.

approach.title: whakatata
approach.description: Ka kawea e mātou me tētahi tauira pūataata, auau e pupuri ana i te tukunga me te whakaiti i te mōrea hua.
points: Kitea: tautuhi wawe i te whānuitanga, ngā manakē, me ngā ine angitu.
Hanga: kaipuke i ngā āpitihanga arotahi me ngā koromeke urupare motukore.
Arotautia: aroturuki i ngā putanga me te whakapai ake i te mahinga i roto i te wā.

cta.title: Kua rite koe ki te panoni i tō pakihi?
cta.description: Hono atu ki te rārangi tipu o ngā kamupene e whakawhirinaki ana ki a Horizon Tech ki te tuku rongoā auaha me ngā hua tino pai.

hero.title: Whakapā mai ki a Mātou
hero.description: He kaupapa kei roto i te hinengaro? E hiahia ana mātou ki te whakarongo mai i a koe. Toro atu ki te matapaki me pēhea mātou e āwhina ai ki te whakaora i ō whakaaro.

booking.title: Tāpuia he Hui
booking.description: Whakaritea he waea hura 30 meneti koreutu

email.title: Īmēra
email.description: Tukuna mai he īmēra ki a mātou i ngā wā katoa

response.title: Wā Urupare
response.description: I te nuinga o te wā ka urupare mātou i roto i

form.title: Tukua he karere ki a mātou
form.success: Tēnā koe mō tō karere. Ka hoki atu mātou ki a koe i roto i te 24-48 haora.
form.error: Something went wrong. Ngana anō, īmēra hāngai mai rānei.
form.subject: Marau:*

placeholders.name: Ko tō ingoa
placeholders.subject: He aha tā mātou e āwhina ai?
placeholders.message: Kōrero mai mō tō kaupapa, uiui rānei...

required.name: E hiahiatia ana te ingoa katoa.
required.email: E hiahiatia ana te wāhitau īmēra.
required.subject: Kōwhiria koa he kaupapa.

validation.email: Tāuru koa i tētahi wāhitau īmēra tika.
validation.messageMinLength: Kia {{count}} neke atu rānei ngā pūāhua te roa o te karere.

contact.reasonsTitle: He aha te take e mahi tahi ai me mātou?
reasons: AI/ML me ngā tohunga hoahoa kapua
Whanaketanga agile me te whakawhitiwhitinga pūataata
Tautoko me te tautiakitanga mo te wā roa

custom.title: Ngā Rongoā Ritenga
custom.description: Kei te kimi rongoā kua whakaritea? Ka mahi ngātahi mātou me ngā kiritaki kia mārama ki ngā hiahia ahurei me te tuku pūmanawa ritenga e whakahaere ana i ngā hua ine.

faq.title: He pātai anō?
faq.description: Tirohia tā mātou wāhanga FAQ mō ngā whakautu tere

hero.titlePrefix: Tūtaki ki ngā Hinengaro i Muri
hero.description: He rōpū hangarau rerekē, kaihoahoa, me ngā kaitohutohu e hanga tahi ana i ngā hua matihiko pānga nui.

section.title: Te Tīma Kaiārahi
section.description: Ko ngā kaiārahi pūkenga e ārahi ana i te kitenga me te tipu o Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: He kaiārahi matakite me te kaihoahoa hangarau me te 10+ tau i roto i ngā pūmanawa hinonga, e tohunga ana ki te AI/ML, ngā pūhara kapua, me te hoahoa hua tauine.

ahmet.bio: I arotahi te tohunga haumarutanga ki te hoahoa haumarutanga hinonga, te hanganga haumaru i runga i te rohe, me te tukunga tuatahi mō ngā taiao kua whakaritea.

culture.title: Te Ora i Horizon Tech
culture.description: We foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning

remoteFirst.title: Ahurea Mamao-Tuatahi
remoteFirst.description: Mahi mai i hea me ngā haora ngāwari me te arotahi ki ngā hua, kaua ki te tauwāhi.

collaborative.title: Taiao Ngātahi
collaborative.description: Ngā takahanga tīma auau, ngā wātū tiritiri mātauranga, me te ngātahitanga whakawhiti-taumahinga.

workLife.title: Whārite Mahi-Ora
workLife.description: Te kaupapa hararei ohaoha, te tautoko hauora hinengaro, me te whakaute i te wā whaiaro.

innovation.title: Wā Hou
innovation.description: 20% wā mō ngā kaupapa whaiaro, hackathons, me te tūhura i ngā hangarau hou.

cta.title: E hiahia ana koe ki te hono ki tā mātou tīma?
cta.description: Kei te kimi tonu mātou i ngā tāngata whai pūkenga e māharahara ana ki te mahi mahi, te rangatiratanga, me te mahi hou.

hero.description: Hono atu ki tētahi tīma kaipūkaha e hanga ana i ngā pūmanawa tapa-tapa mō ngā kiritaki huri noa. Mahi mamao, tipu tonu, me te whai pānga tūturu.

process.title: Tā mātou Tukanga Tono
process.description: Pūataata, māia, me te whakaute i tō wā

steps.title: Hoatu
steps.description: Tukuna tō tono, ā, ka arotakea e mātou i roto i ngā rā mahi e 3.

steps.title: Kōrerorero Tuatahi
steps.description: He waea ataata 30 meneti hei kōrerorero i ō wheako me ō tūmanako.

steps.title: Hangarau
steps.description: Uiuinga hangarau, mahi ā-ringa rānei hei whakaatu i ō pūkenga.

steps.title: Tukunga
steps.description: Tūtaki ki te tīma me te whiwhi i tō tono kia uru ki Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Ngā Tūnga Whakatuwhera
jobs.description: Find your next opportunity and join our growing team
jobs.unavailable: Kāore i te whakaae ki ngā taupānga i tēnei wā
jobs.noMatch: Kāore koe e kite i te tūranga tino tika?
jobs.sendCv: Tukuna mai tō CV ki a mātou

listings.title: Kaipūkaha Tāpae-Katoa Matua
listings.description: Hangaia ngā taupānga hinonga tauine mā te whakamahi i ngā hangarau React, Node.js, me ngā hangarau kapua.

listings.title: Kaipūkaha DevOps
listings.description: Hoahoa me te pupuri i ngā paipa CI/CD, hanganga hei waehere, me ngā pūnaha aroturuki.

listings.title: Kaipūkaha AI/ML
listings.description: Whakawhanake i ngā tauira ako mīhini me ngā rongoā AI mō ngā kiritaki hinonga.

listings.title: Kaihoahoa Hua
listings.description: Waihangatia ngā wheako kaiwhakamahi ātaahua, mōhio hoki mō ngā taupānga hinonga matatini.

listings.title: Kaihoahoa Rongoā
listings.description: Hoahoa i ngā rongoā hangarau mutunga-ki-te-mutunga me te ārahi i ngā kiritaki mā te panoni mamati.

listings.title: Kaituhi Hangarau
listings.description: Waihangatia ngā tuhinga whānui, ngā akoranga, me ngā ihirangi hangarau.

cta.title: He pātai mō te mahi i konei?
cta.description: E hiahia ana mātou ki te whakarongo mai i a koe. Toro atu, ā, mā mātou e whakautu ētahi pātai mō te oranga i Horizon Tech.

hero.titlePrefix: Te tuku i ngā hua e
hero.description: Tūhura he pēhea tā mātou āwhina i ngā kamupene puta noa i ngā umanga ki te panoni i ngā mahi mā te hangarau ā-ringa, pānga tiketike.

items.title: Hekenga Kapua me te Whakahoutanga
items.description: I whakahekea ngā pūnaha pēke tawhito ki te hanganga kapua AWS me te kore wā heke.
items.challenge: Ko te hoahoa monolithic tuku iho e puta ai ngā take tauine
items.result: I tutuki pai te heke ki ngā ratonga moroiti i AWS

items.title: Pūhara Tātaritanga Hiko-AI
items.description: I hangaia ngā tauira ML mō te tātari atahanga rongoā me te tika 95%+.
items.challenge: He roa rawa ngā tukanga tātaritanga ā-ringa

items.title: Paemana Tātaritanga Wā-Tūturu
items.description: I hangaia te pūhara BI e tukatuka ana i ngā takahanga 10M+ ia rā.
items.challenge: Kāore he kitenga wā tūturu ki ngā ine pakihi matua
items.result: Pūhara tātaritanga me ngā kitenga wā-tūturu

cta.title: Kua rite koe ki te tuhi i tō pūrākau angitu?
cta.description: Me matapaki tātou me pēhea mātou e āwhina ai i a koe ki te whakatutuki i ngā putanga ōrite me te tauine i runga i te maia.

filters.title: Tātari Ahumahi
filters.empty: Kāore he akoranga take e ōrite ana ki te tātari umanga kua tīpakohia.

hero.titlePrefix: Ngā Kitenga me ngā Whakaaro mai i
hero.description: Ngā akoranga hangarau, ngā mōhiotanga ahumahi, me ngā akoranga ā-ringa mai i ngā mahi tuku tūturu.

featuredPost.title: Te Wā Heke mai o te Whanaketanga Kapua-Māori: Ngā Āhuatanga hei Mātakitaki i te 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Tūhura i ngā āhuatanga hou o te whanaketanga kapua-māori, mai i ngā hoahoa tūmau kore ki te rorohiko tapa.

posts.title: Hanga i ngā ratonga moroiti tauine mā te Ratonga Azure Kubernetes
posts.excerpt: He aratohu ā-ringa ki te hoahoa me te hora i ngā ratonga moroiti mā te whakamahi i te AKS.

posts.title: Ako Mīhini i roto i te Whakanaotanga: Ngā Akoranga i Akona
posts.excerpt: Ngā akoranga i whakamātauria e te āpure mai i te hora i ngā tauira ML i te tauine.

posts.title: Urupare 19: He aha ngā mea hōu me te take e hira ai
posts.excerpt: He ruku hōhonu ki ngā āhuahira React 19 me ngā pānga mahinga.

newsletter.title: Ohauru ki tā mātou pānui
newsletter.description: Tīkina ngā tuhinga, ngā akoranga, me ngā kitenga hōu rawa i ia wiki.
newsletter.note: Kāore he spam. Weteohauru i ngā wā katoa.

hero.title: Rangitaki Pūkaha Hangarau Horizon
hero.description: Ngā tuhipoka āpure me ngā tauira ā-ringa mai i ngā tīma e hanga ana i ngā hua AI, ngā pūnaha hinonga, me ngā pūhara kapua pono.

general.description: Whakahōungia ō taipitopito whaiaro me ō mōhiohio hoapā
general.emailNotice: Kāore e taea te huri i te īmēra. Whakapā atu ki te tautoko mēnā kei te hiahia āwhina koe.

preferences.description: Whakahaere me pēhea tō whiwhi whakahōu me ngā whakamōhiotanga

email.title: Ngā Whakamōhiotanga Īmēra
email.description: Whiwhi whakahōu me ngā matohi mā te īmēra

sms.title: Ngā Whakamōhiotanga SMS
sms.description: Whiwhi matohi hira mā te karere kuputuhi

optOut.title: Kōwhiri Atu i ngā Pūrongo Whakaharatau
optOut.description: Hunaia ō pūrongo mai i te kaipupuru mahi

support.title: Pokapū Tautoko
support.subtitle: Tiki āwhina ki ā mātou ratonga whanaketanga pūmanawa

email.title: Tautoko Īmēra
email.description: Tukuna mai he īmēra ki a mātou mō ētahi uiui

resources.title: Ngā Rauemi
resources.description: Ngā rauemi hangarau me ngā kaiārahi

support.faqDescription: Ngā whakautu tere ki ngā pātai auau

faqs.question: He aha ngā ratonga e tukuna ana e Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Ka whakarato mātou i te whanaketanga pūmanawa ritenga, ngā rongoā AI/ML, te hoahoa kapua, te DevOps, te mōhiohio pakihi, me ngā ratonga IoT.

faqs.question: Me pēhea taku tīmata i tētahi kaupapa me Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Whakapā mai mā te puka, īmēra rānei me ō whakaritenga. Ka whakaritea e mātou he waea hura me te tiritiri i tētahi kaupapa.

faqs.question: E whakarato ana koe i te tautoko me te tautiakitanga haere tonu?
faqs.answer: Āe. Ka tukuna e mātou ngā mōkī tautoko me te tautiakitanga kei roto ko ngā whakatika iro, ngā whakahōutanga haumarutanga, me ngā whakapainga āhuahira.

education.title: Ngā Rauemi Hangarau
education.subtitle: Ngā kaiārahi, ngā akoranga, me ngā mahi tino pai mai i te tīma Horizon Tech

hub.title: Pokapū Ako
hub.description: Tūhura i ā mātou rauemi hangarau kua whakaritea puta noa i te kapua, AI/ML, DevOps, me te whanaketanga pūmanawa hōu.
hub.note: E hāngai ana ēnei rauemi ki te wheako kaupapa tūturu, ā, ka whakahōutia auautia.

training.description: Ka tukuna e mātou ngā wānanga kua whakaritea mō ngā tīma pūkaha me ngā hua
training.text: E hiahia ana koe ki te whakangungu ā-ringa? Ka whakarato mātou i ngā akoranga ritenga mō te hoahoa kapua, DevOps, me ngā tikanga tuku hou.

unauthorized.title: Aukatinga Uru
unauthorized.description: Kāore i a koe te whakaaetanga kia whakaahei i tēnei whārangi. Whakapā atu ki tō kaiwhakahaere ki te whakaaro koe he hē tēnei.
